message:
test(artifacts): refresh e2e packet fixtures, golden journeys, and CI smoke manifest

Re-record the pipeline-level test artifacts from a fresh run.  Splits
naturally into three buckets, all under artifacts/:

  artifacts/e2e/*.e2e.json                (36 files)
    Per-packet end-to-end fixtures (P2C-001..P2C-004 dispatch + IR +
    transform stack journeys, plus the cross-cutting suites:
    adversarial_fixtures, bitwise_reductions, control_flow_ad,
    control_flow_conformance, mixed_dtype, multirank_fixtures,
    nested_traces, rng_determinism, tolerance_tightening,
    vmap_tensor_ops).  All entries flip ts_utc_unix_ms forward to the
    new run's wall clock and refresh duration_ms; case totals
    (e.g. total_cases=611 on the P2C-001 full_dispatch_pipeline) are
    unchanged, no fixture flipped pass<->fail, no schema drift.

  artifacts/e2e/golden_journeys/gj_*.golden.json   (8 files)
    The eight curated golden journeys (basic_jit_transform,
    gradient_computation, batched_computation, transform_composition,
    cache_hit_miss, error_recovery, large_program, ledger_inspection).
    Same shape: timing fields and run-stamp move; observed semantics are
    identical to HEAD.

  artifacts/ci/runs/synthetic-forensics-test/manifest.json   (1 file)
    The synthetic forensics CI smoke manifest -- updates
    finished_at_unix_ms and the per-failure timestamp_unix_ms entries.
    The four seeded failures it tracks (G2/jaxpr_fingerprint_deterministic
    fingerprint mismatch, G4/fj_conformance::fuzz::fuzz_jaxpr_construction
    panic on empty invars, G6/dispatch_jit_scalar_add p95 regression
    2500->3200 ns, fmt::check_formatting 3 dirty files) are intentional
    seeded failures used by the forensics gate -- their summaries and
    detail_path values are unchanged.

This is a pure artifact refresh -- no source, fixture-shape, or
contract-table edits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
